india_trends.title: India bans sugar exports till September to stabilise domestic prices
india_trends.summary: India has banned sugar exports until September 30. This move aims to stabilize domestic prices as supply tightens. The ban applies to raw, white, and refined sugar. Exceptions exist for specific quotas and ongoing shipments. This decision reflects efforts to build buffer stocks. Domestic prices have

india_trends.title: Adani enters hospitality biz with IHG hotel pact for five hotels across four Indian cities
india_trends.summary: In a groundbreaking move for the hospitality industry, Adani Airport Holdings has announced its foray into the sector through a strategic partnership with IHG Hotels & Resorts. They are set to launch five stylish hotels in key locations, including Jaipur, Navi Mumbai, Mangaluru, and Thiruvananth

india_trends.title: Nvidia hits new peak, market cap crosses $5.6 trillion after report on US nod for H200 chip sales to China
india_trends.summary: Nvidia shares rose 5% to a record $236.47 after the US approved 10 Chinese firms to buy the H200 AI chip. Despite this, sales have not occurred due to Chinese government restrictions and licensing requirements. Nvidia's market cap exceeds $5.6 trillion ahead of upcoming earnings reports.

india_trends.title: Chip startup Cerebras hits $80 bn in value in strong stock debut
india_trends.summary: Shares of US chip startup Cerebras Systems surged Thursday in its trading debut, more than doubling at one point and hitting a market value of $80 billion. Shortly after 1730 GMT, Cerebras stood at $332.51, up around 80 percent on the Nasdaq exchange after earlier reaching $385.

india_trends.title: IRB Infra Trust offers to sell two BOT highway assets worth Rs 4,663 crore to IRB InvIT Fund
india_trends.summary: IRB Infrastructure Trust has offered two of its revenue-generating highway assets, valued at approximately Rs 4,663 crore, to IRB InvIT Fund. The non-binding offer includes the Solapur Yedeshi NH211 and Chittorgarh Gulabpura NH79 BOT Assets, totaling 1,144 Lane km. This move aims to fund future oppo

india_trends.title: NCLAT rejects Venugopal Dhoot’s plea to include foreign oil assets in Videocon insolvency
india_trends.summary: The appellate tribunal ruled that overseas oil and gas assets belong to separate entities and cannot be merged with the domestic insolvency proceedings of Videocon Industries.

india_trends.title: DLF to target pre-sale of Rs 20,000 crore in FY27, super-luxury project ‘The Dahlias’ to lead growth
india_trends.summary: DLF, India's largest real estate developer, targets Rs 20,000 crore in sales for FY27. The company plans significant project launches in Gurugram, Mumbai, and Goa. Its super-luxury project, The Dahlias, continues to be a key sales driver. DLF ended FY26 with zero gross debt in its development busine

india_trends.title: JSW Steel raises capacity target to 80 mtpa amid strong FY26 results
india_trends.summary: JSW Steel plans to nearly double its steelmaking capacity to about 80 mtpa by 2031 through aggressive brownfield expansion and joint ventures, positioning the firm among the world’s biggest producers. The expansion roadmap came as the company reported strong results for FY26 and the March quarter.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold drops $35/oz; silver tumbles $5/oz amid stronger dollar, rate fears
india_trends.summary: Precious metals fell on 14 May as traders hesitated amid geopolitical tensions and a strengthening US dollar. Gold dropped $35 to $4,671, while silver fell $5 to $84.36, though it remained above $80. Retail sales rose, indicating consumer resilience despite rising inflation.

india_trends.title: Rising UAE gold flows draw attention amid austerity push
india_trends.summary: The trend raises concerns that higher inflows under the India-UAE CEPA could dilute the impact of 15% customs duty on gold and silver.

india_trends.title: Air India clocks record annual loss of over $2 billion in threat to turnaround plans
india_trends.summary: The disclosure on Air India loss was made in Singapore Airlines' annual report, which went on to say that the management saw indicators of impairment for the Air India investment.

india_trends.title: Sebi proposes major overhaul of derivatives rules to simplify compliance for exchanges
india_trends.summary: India's market regulator Sebi is proposing significant changes to derivatives trading rules. The aim is to make compliance easier for stock exchanges and clearing corporations. Several outdated rules will be removed, and operational requirements will be streamlined. These proposals are part of an in

india_trends.title: Goyal calls for aligning standards, customs procedures between India and Africa to boost bilateral trade
india_trends.summary: India's Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal urged for harmonized standards and customs procedures with Africa. This move aims to significantly boost bilateral trade. The African Continental Free Trade Area and India's growing economy offer substantial opportunities for resilient partnerships. Key sectors

india_trends.title: Smartphone demand dip is driving OneAssist diversification
india_trends.summary: From refurbished phones to high-end fashion, OneAssist is seeing a protection gap.

india_trends.title: Marginal utilisation of gold quota under UAE trade deal: Official
india_trends.summary: India's trade with the UAE is growing significantly. Gems and jewellery imports from the UAE have increased. However, this rise is in line with overall bilateral trade expansion. The special quota for gold imports from the UAE is being used modestly. This indicates a broader diversification of trade

india_trends.title: Gold imports under India, UAE FTA quota remain modest: Official
india_trends.summary: Gold imports under a special trade deal with the UAE have seen low usage. The India-UAE Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement offers a duty concession. However, actual imports under this scheme have been marginal. This comes as India increased its overall gold import duty.

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday
india_trends.summary: BSE Sensex and Nifty 50 extended gains for a second session, led by banking, metal and pharma stocks despite IT weakness. Analysts flagged 23,800 as a key resistance for Nifty, while broader market breadth remained mildly negative amid selective buying and selling pressure.

india_trends.title: Airtel to set up 56 edge data centres within 2 yrs; tariff structure in India needs to change: Gopal Vittal
india_trends.summary: Bharti Airtel is set to build 56 edge data centers in the next 18 to 24 months. This expansion aims to significantly scale up the company's business in the data center segment. The move is part of a larger strategy to strengthen infrastructure and gain market share. Airtel is also focusing on its fi

india_trends.title: Blackstone data center vehicle opens flat in New York debut after $1.75 billion IPO
india_trends.summary: BLACKSTONE DIGITAL INFRASTRUCTURE TRUST-IPO/ (UPDATE 1)UPDATE 1-Blackstone data center vehicle opens flat in New York debut after $1.75 billion IPO

india_trends.title: Expect PV sales in India to grow 10% in FY27: TMPV MD & CEO Shailesh Chandra
india_trends.summary: Passenger vehicle sales in India are projected to grow by approximately 10% this fiscal year, driven by sustained strong demand. Despite geopolitical uncertainties and potential fuel price hikes, the industry remains optimistic about maintaining this growth momentum. Tata Motors is confident in its

Boeing’s stock drops as Trump’s order deal with China disappoints
world_trends.summary: Boeing’s stock on Thursday headed for its steepest fall in six months after President Donald Trump said China is buying 200 of the company’s jets, disappointing investors who had expected more than double that number.

world_trends.title: Trump discloses big buys of shares in Boeing and Nvidia as the companies look set to gain from his China trip
world_trends.summary: President Donald Trump has filed a disclosure showing massive buying and selling of U.S. stocks, index funds and other securities, including purchasing at least $1 million in shares of Boeing and Nvidia as those companies expect to score new business during his trip to China.

world_trends.title: War, inflation and Trump’s tariffs have shaken the US. Why does the stock market keep going up? - The Guardian
